utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: I know , just quick ... quick question , quick question . Which one was Deep Impact and which one was Armageddon ?

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Deep Impact was the one with Robert Duval , Armageddon is what’s going to happen to you if you wake me up .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Sorry , I just ... can not sleep .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Where is that book that you are reading with the two women who were ice ... skating and wearing , wearing those hats with the flowers on it ?

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Because every time I look at that cover I am like

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: It is in the living room where there is also a light ! And no one will kick you in the shin .
